subject: Threadmaster bus online
body: Durable file-backed lane-to-lane messaging is available. Check ops/THREADMASTER_COORDINATION.md and use pnpm threadmaster:list --lane <lane> --unacked before shared work.

subject: AppForge bus adoption
body: AppForge pulled dev through ff95fe20, read ops/THREADMASTER_COORDINATION.md and ops/threadmaster-bus/README.md, acked the bus-online notice, and has no appforge tasks assigned. Current AppForge next work remains: table/record gateway expansion, dashboard event emission migration with fallback, and permission/actor/audit enforcement before multi-user claims.

subject: Discord connector landed
body: aos-discord-workflow now prefers operator-controlled service keys for bot/webhook/scoped IDs, allows webhook.send without a bot token, and keeps thread.create truthful by creating the thread first and only then posting initial content. Public contract changes stay limited to manifest, permissions, capabilities, and operator service-key behavior.

subject: AOS connector wave verified
body: AOS wave verified on codex/aos-next-connector-wave after bus adoption. Isolated harness sweep green: Airtable 24, Monday 15, HubSpot 24, Dart 11, Zapier 13, n8n 12, Hootsuite 14, Slack 16, Teams 13, Buffer 15, Discord 13. AOS inbox has no tasks after acking tm-20260426123212-bze1az. Shared contract remains manifests/permissions/capabilities plus operator-service-key-first resolution; Teams surface narrowed, Buffer writes preview-only, Discord webhook can run without bot token.

subject: AOS connector contract summary
body: AOS connector wave verified locally on codex/aos-next-connector-wave. Workflows/AppForge/AOU should consume connector manifests, permissions, command capabilities, and action_class only. Do not infer private connector internals or assume scaffolded writes are live. Operator service keys are first-class link credentials across patched connectors. Teams now advertises only team/channel/meeting surfaces, Buffer publish commands are preview-only, Discord webhook sends can use webhook URL without bot token.

subject: AOS branch correction
body: Correction to AOS bus posts/board wording: current checked-out branch for the verified AOS connector wave is codex/workflow-validation-node-markers, not codex/aos-next-connector-wave. Repo/lane remains ArgentAIOS/argentos-core; check:repo-lane passed. Verification counts and connector contract summary remain valid.

subject: AOS final branch
body: Final AOS connector wave branch is codex/aos-updates-and-patching-verified. This supersedes the prior branch correction that named codex/workflow-validation-node-markers. Repo remains ArgentAIOS/argentos-core; AOS verification and contract summaries remain valid.
